candidates.title: Raise SMART_RUNNER_TRIM_REASSESS round-trip threshold — narrowed to rank = 100 only
candidates.rationale: 5 hits across 3 months; only 2 are at rank 100. Rank-65 and rank-69 cases showed the guard protecting correctly against weak setups.

candidates.title: Earnings-cluster entry block on anchor day +/- 1 for cluster participants
candidates.rationale: Sep had 0 earnings clusters, so Sep provided no new evidence. Wait for Oct (5 clusters per backdrop) and Nov (5 clusters).

candidates.title: Narrow PRE_EVENT_RECOVERY_EXIT to FOMC/NFP/CPI + MFE-giveback >50 pct only
candidates.rationale: 7 firings across 3 months, mean PnL -0.09 pct, 0 wins above +0.10 pct. Rule is exiting flat on non-impactful events (low-surprise CPI/PPI). Narrowing to high-impact events + significant MFE giveback preserves the intended behaviour in risky cases while eliminating the dead-weight exits.

candidates.title: Joint relaxation of tt_pullback_not_deep_enough + tt_bias_not_aligned for index ETFs
candidates.rationale: Same top-2 blockers for SPY/QQQ/IWM across all 3 months. Consistent pattern justifies moving forward with the joint-relaxation simulation.

candidates.title: End-of-window protective trail on runners
candidates.rationale: Jul 3W/1L, Aug 2W/1L, Sep 1W/1L. Still net positive by PnL (big winners dwarf clear losers) but count ratio evened out. Decision point: if Oct looks like Sep, T7 is not worth the code change.

candidates.title: Block non-Prime entries in 48h pre-FOMC window
candidates.rationale: 5 entries bunched on Sep 16, 4 into the 48h pre-FOMC window, 4 lost or near-flat. Would eliminate ~4 of 6 clear Sep losers. Preserves Prime setups.

candidates.title: Regime-conditional entry gates: transitional + vol < 8 pct -> drop pullback_min_bearish_count to 1 for Tier-1 Prime
candidates.rationale: Transitional months produce inconsistent output (Aug 15 trades 66 pct WR, Sep 28 trades 46 pct WR) vs uptrend (36 trades 78 pct). Engine is tuned for uptrend-style 2-of-3 ST pullbacks; transitional backdrops break that pattern.
dependencies: Phase-B backdrop JSON wiring into replay runtime

acceptance_budget.note: Sep's 46.4 pct WR is now the binding floor: any DA-key change must hold Sep to >= 44.4 pct WR (-2 pp) and >= +5.83 pct sum_pnl (0.9x).
